chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-128 of 2020. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection at “A”. 02. For orders on maintainability of main case. 15.03.2022 Mr. Sajid Ali Chandio, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for his appointment in civil service on deceased quota basis; as per him his father being employee of Irrigation Department has died in year 2002. After death of his father, the petitioner has slept over his cause for about thirteen years even after attaining the age of majority. No plausible explanation to such delay is offered by the petitioner. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being hit by laches miserably is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
